ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus location of the university */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the university */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the university */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment at the university */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree offered by the program */,
  "program_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program type */,
  "field_of_study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field of study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the program is shared across multiple universities */,
  "joint_programs" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of joint program IDs if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_field_of_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_of_study_id") REFERENCES fields_of_study ("field_of_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_degree_id FOREIGN KEY ("degree_id") REFERENCES degrees ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_type_id") REFERENCES program_types ("program_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_types" (
  "program_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program type */,
  "program_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the program type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of programs of this type */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for programs of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the degree */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the degree */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_study" (
  "field_of_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of study */,
  "field_of_study_name" TEXT /* Name of the field of study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field of study */,
  "related_fields" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of related fields */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Specific requirements for the field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_of_study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accreditation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the accreditation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accreditation status */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the status becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the status expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accreditation_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation request */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of accreditation request (e.g., initial, renewal) */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accreditation status */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the request */,
  "supporting_documents" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of supporting documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_requests_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES accreditation_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_requests_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accreditation_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation submission */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accreditation request */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of accreditation submission (e.g., self-study, site visit) */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the submission */,
  "documents" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of documents submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_submissions_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES accreditation_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_submissions_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, program director) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last user login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program director */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the director started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the director ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_directors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_directors_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university administrator */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the administrator started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the administrator ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_administrators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_administrators_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accreditation_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation officer */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the officer started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the officer ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_officers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_officers_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_accreditation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation history entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "accreditation_date" TEXT /* Date of accreditation */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accreditation status */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in accreditation status */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accreditation officer who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_accreditation_history_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_accreditation_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES accreditation_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_accreditation_history_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accreditation request */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accreditation submission */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., request submitted, submission approved) */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES accreditation_submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES accreditation_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
